text:
K0710A3 Percent Caloric Intake Through Parenteral/Tube Feeding During the Entire Seven Days. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the proportion of total calories that the resident received through parenteral or tube feeding during entire seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
1=25% or less
2=26-50%
3=51% or more
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2013
